summary: Tested Stripe Connect migration from Plaid. Backend endpoints working correctly with proper error handling. Frontend CreatorSettings.jsx properly displays Stripe Connect UI. Fixed stripe.error.StripeError exception handling for Stripe v13+. The Stripe API key 'sk_test_emergent' is invalid - a real Stripe test key is needed for full functionality.

critical.issue: Stripe API key 'sk_test_emergent' is invalid - returns 'Invalid API Key provided'
critical.note: This is a configuration issue, not a code issue. A valid Stripe test key is required.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/status returns connected=false for new users (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/status requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/status requires creator role (403)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/create-account requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/create-account requires creator role (403)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/create-account returns proper Stripe error with invalid key (400)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/onboarding-link requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/onboarding-link requires creator role (403)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect/onboarding-link returns proper Stripe error with invalid key (400)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/balance returns correct structure (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/balance requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/connect/balance requires creator role (403)
Backend: GET /api/creator/earnings returns correct structure (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/creator/earnings requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/creator/earnings requires creator role (403)
Backend: GET /api/creator/payouts returns empty list for new user (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/creator/payouts requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/creator/payouts requires creator role (403)
Backend: GET /api/events works without authentication (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without session
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with ShowMeLive branding
Frontend: /select-role page shows Content Creator and Content Viewer options
Frontend: Continue as Creator redirects to Google OAuth
Frontend: /creator/settings page loads with Stripe Connect UI
Frontend: Payout Settings header displayed
Frontend: Balance overview (Total Earnings, Pending Payouts, Available to Withdraw) displayed
Frontend: Payment Account section with Connect with Stripe button displayed
Frontend: Powered by Stripe branding displayed
Frontend: Connect with Stripe button is clickable and calls API
Frontend: Error toast displays Stripe API error correctly
Frontend: Payout History section displayed
Frontend: MockPlaidLink.jsx component deleted (migration complete)
Frontend: No references to Plaid in frontend code
action_items: CRITICAL: Replace 'sk_test_emergent' with a valid Stripe test API key in /app/backend/.env to enable Stripe Connect functionality
The Stripe Connect integration code is correct - only the API key needs to be updated
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: stripe.error.StripeError changed to stripe.StripeError for Stripe v13+ compatibility
Code quality: Stripe Connect endpoints properly check for creator role and authentication
Code quality: Error handling properly returns Stripe errors to frontend
seed_data_creation: Created test creator user with session for testing Stripe Connect endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Connect migration from Plaid is complete. Backend endpoints are working but require a valid Stripe API key. The test key 'sk_test_emergent' is invalid. Frontend properly displays Stripe Connect UI and handles API errors gracefully. MockPlaidLink.jsx has been deleted.

stripe_api_key_issue.solution: Replace with a valid Stripe test API key from https://dashboard.stripe.com/test/apikeys

fixes_applied.issue: stripe.error.StripeError is deprecated in Stripe v13+
fixes_applied.fix: Changed to stripe.StripeError in 4 exception handlers (lines 1676, 1710, 1757, 1827)
